summary: Telegram Bot Integration feature tested - All 10 test cases passed. Backend API endpoints validated (config CRUD, test message, send report, logs). Frontend UI verified (all inputs, buttons, setup guide visible and functional). Buttons correctly disabled when Bot Token or Chat ID is empty.
critical_code_review_comments: Code quality is good - proper validation for bot_token and chat_id on both frontend and backend
Security: Bot token is masked on GET /api/telegram/config response
Bot token validation against Telegram API before saving config - good practice
data-testid attributes present on all interactive elements for testing
Scheduler loop properly handles exceptions and checks enabled flag
seed_data_creation: None - tested validation paths only (no real Telegram credentials)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Telegram Bot Integration fully tested. Navigate: Login as admin > Settings tab > scroll to 'Telegram Bot - Daily Report' section. All 5 API endpoints tested: GET/POST /api/telegram/config, POST /api/telegram/test, POST /api/telegram/send-report, GET /api/telegram/logs. Note: Tests validate error handling paths since no real Telegram bot credentials available - this is expected behavior.
